title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. pseudosenile
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. pseudosenile, also known as hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. Hieracium vulgatum subsp. pseudosenile can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
